description: Baseline prompt with an explicit 1-to-9 range and no list placeholder.
text: Please choose a random number from 1 to 9. Reply with exactly one Arabic numeral and no explanation.

description: Fairness cue with a comma-separated list.
text: Please choose one number fairly from {numbers_csv}. Output digits only.
Choose one number from the following list: {numbers_spaced}. Output exactly one digit.

description: Uniformity cue using the natural range form.
text: Please avoid favoring any number and choose uniformly from 1 to 9. Output exactly one Arabic numeral.
